mapper.sql: A.NEWS_ID AS newsId, A.NEWS_SJ AS newsSj, A.NEWS_CN AS newsCn, A.NEWS_ORIGIN AS newsOrigin, A.NTCE_DE AS ntceDe, A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_NEWS_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.NEWS_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NEWS_INFO A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_NEWS_INFO A WHERE A.NEWS_ID = #{newsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NEWS_INFO (NEWS_ID, NEWS_SJ, NEWS_CN, NEWS_ORIGIN, NTCE_DE, ATCH_FILE_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{newsId}, #{newsSj}, #{newsCn}, #{newsOrigin}, #{ntceDe}, #{atchFileId}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
